name: Critical Bugfix & Environment Setup
description: Fix emotionalGoal onboarding bug by adding onboardingCompleted boolean to UserPreferences type. Create .env.example with all Firebase, Stripe, and Groq variables for deployment. Update lib/store.ts to use the new flag instead of !emotionalGoal check.

name: SmartRescheduler Component
description: Build components/ai/SmartRescheduler.tsx that detects overdue scheduled blocks on app load. Display bottom sheet with Groq AI-powered energy-aware rescheduling suggestions. Integrate with useStore() updateBlock to shift remaining day's tasks. Add to page.tsx after Header.

name: SnoozeModal & ActionCard Integration
description: Create components/modals/SnoozeModal.tsx with snooze options (5min, 15min, 30min, 1h, Later). Shift selected action and all subsequent blocks. Add Framer Motion slide-up animation and non-judgmental messaging. Modify ActionCard.tsx to include snooze button trigger.

name: SoundSystem & Haptic Feedback
description: Build components/polish/SoundSystem.tsx with useSoundSystem() hook providing playSound('complete'|'start'|'snooze'|'achievement'). Implement Web Audio API for procedural sound generation (no external files). Add navigator.vibrate() for mobile haptics. Add soundEnabled toggle to SettingsPage.tsx.

name: Android-Optimized Install Banner
description: Enhance components/InstallBanner.tsx with Android Chrome detection. Update messaging to highlight feature parity advantages over Structured app. Improve PWA installation UX with platform-specific guidance for Android users.

name: Structured.app Migration Banner
description: Create components/onboarding/MigrationBanner.tsx shown once post-onboarding. Guide users to export from Structured and import to Senseday. Trigger existing ImportModal for seamless data migration.

name: Testing & Performance Polish
description: End-to-end testing of all new modules. Verify emotionalGoal fix prevents onboarding loops. Performance audit for SmartRescheduler AI calls and SoundSystem latency. Cross-browser PWA validation on Android Chrome and desktop.
